title: ononis tridentata f. latifolia
intro: Ononis tridentata f. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis tridentata f. latifolia include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, or applied topically as a poultice or cream for skin conditions.
